div.head: ES–11. Editorial Note
div.p: Representatives of the United States and El Salvador exchanged notes dated January 15 and 22, 1960, at San Salvador indefinitely extending the Agreement of November 21, 1957, for a United States Air Force Mission in El Salvador. The notes were transmitted to the Department in despatch 310 from San Salvador, January 29, 1960. (611.167/1–2960) For the text of the notes, see 11 UST 76.
